codeReview.summary: The follow-up fix resolves the original accessible-name regression. `Button.vue` now only applies the loading fallback label when the button is loading and has neither visible text nor a caller-provided `aria-label`, so text buttons and labeled icon buttons keep their original accessible names while unlabeled loading buttons still expose `加载中`.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature and the fix feature `fix-button-loading-accessible-name` via their handoffs, transcript skeletons, diffs, and current `Button` implementation/tests. The current code preserves visible-text and caller-supplied labels during loading, adds the fallback label only for unlabeled loading buttons, and includes regression coverage for all required scenarios, so the original blocking issue is fixed.
